stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (CSE / IT) M.E / M.Tech (CSE, IT) M.Sc (CSE, IT) Ph.D (CSE, IT)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months of probation / training : Rs 25,000 per month Salary after 6 months of probation / training (On absorption) : CTC 12 LPA + ₹1.5 lakh bonus Other Benefits Health Insurance Remote Work 25 day paid time off Weekend fixed off Annual increments Device allowance Conference allowance
